name: ASTROTECH Corp
summary: ASTROTECH Corp (ASTC) is a technology company that develops and commercializes products and services for government and commercial customers. The company operates in areas including mass spectrometry detection technology and related aerospace and defense applications. Specific products and subsidiaries are referenced in the filing but detailed descriptions fall outside the provided Business Description excerpt.
